title: Sorrus Medical Center
content:
{{Top|leg}}
'''Sorrus Medical Center''' was the main hospital in [[Sorrus]]. [[Rai Unlu]] worked at this facility.

Once, the [[Sorrusian]] [[Bounty hunter/Legends|bounty hunter]] [[Ona Nobis]] set a trap in an attempt to apprehend [[Obi-Wan Kenobi/Legends|Obi-Wan Kenobi]] and [[Astri Oddo]]. To aid Nobis in this endeavor, [[Ivo Muna]] posed as a [[Doctor/Legends|doctor]].

==Appearances==
*''[[Jedi Apprentice: The Dangerous Rescue]]''
